description: The TrackedDevicePositioner component is used to get information from the user's input system to get positioning data for tracked objects like headset, hands, and full body trackers.

fields.DeviceIndex: The input Device by index to track.
fields.CorrespondingBodyNode: The body node of the found input Device tracker.
fields.AutoBodyNode: If present, use this to find the input Device to track rather than ``DeviceIndex``.
fields.AlwaysRenderModel: Whether to always render the tracker Debug model regardless of if its mapped to a 3d model.
fields.ReferenceModel: The slot of the debug model visual.
fields.BodyNodeRoot: acts as an offset for the actual position of a Tracked object.
fields.ObjectSlot: The avatar object slot this component is driving.
fields.IsTracking: Whether the input Device is tracking or lost its tracking.
fields.IsActive: Whether the input Device is enabled.
fields.IsSimulated: Whether the device is being simulated instead by the locomotion animation system.
fields.CreateAvatarObjectSlot: Whether to create an avatar object slot component on a slot named "BodyNode" under this component slot if ``BodyNodeRoot`` is null.
fields.PoseFilter: The pose controller for this component to filter its position and movement based on if this component should be filtered.
